creator: kfv@kfv.io
text:
Hello Abdorrahman,

Stop bewildering people's thought and mind about Iran and this User Group which I am trying very hard to keep for devotees to *BSD.
You opened the same discussion on OpenBSD side and once and for all, please stop.
I said, 6 months ago, that including more information is in progress. Look buddy, I don't write the frontend and we are a non-profit group, so indeed we don't have anything but dates on website at the moment but that'll be fixed within 3 or 4 months ahead.
In the meanwhile, you never tried to contact me, so stop lying.
As I said here, and as my Twitter handler is available in footer of the website, and as we have an IRC channel, and as support@irbug.org is available in footer of the website either, you could have sent me emails or pinged me via whatsoever as other people have done and are doing.

Stop being a child, and act in a civil and well-mannered way.
For you my friend:

WHAT WE DO, IS THE PICTURE WE ARE CREATING FOR OUR COUNTRY, SO DO WISELY!

From now on, I will not answer you beneath this thread unless somebody else seeks information or help.

End of discussion,
Faraz
